text.title: ES Projections Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to introduce a new projection.

step.name: design-read-model
step.action: Design a denormalized table optimized for the query (one row per visible item; precomputed joins; sorted by the natural ordering).

step.name: map-events-to-operations
step.action: For each event the projection cares about, map to UPSERT or DELETE on the read model. No INSERT-without-conflict, no complex computation.
step.decision-gate: If any handler contains business logic, FAIL.

step.name: add-checkpoint
step.action: Create `projection_checkpoint(name, stream_position)` (or per-projection table). Update inside the same transaction as the read-model write.

step.name: write-rebuild-script
step.action: Implement `rebuild-<name>` CLI: TRUNCATE read table + checkpoint, then `for each event in stream from 0: handler(event); update_checkpoint(position)`.

step.name: rebuild-rehearsal
step.action: Run incremental + rebuild side by side; diff the resulting tables. Any divergence is a bug. Schedule quarterly CI run.
step.decision-gate: If diff is non-empty, refuse to merge — the projection is non-deterministic.
